roles.name: Archchancellor of Solutions
roles.description: Wears the pointy hat of architecture — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and presides over the High Energy Magic Building.

roles.name: Captain of the Watch
roles.description: Marshals the squad of delivery, holds the schedule, and answers to the Patrician — never give up, never surrender.

roles.name: Clerk of the Stamp Office
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets — every record stamped, sorted, and filed in triplicate.

roles.name: Hex Engineer
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at Hex — feeds it ants and watches the wheels turn (+++ Out of Cheese Error +++).

roles.name: High Priest of the Sto Plains
roles.description: Captain over all Sto Plains Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior wizards.

roles.name: Senior Witch of the Coven
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft and a stern look.

roles.name: Witch of the Chalk
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Senior Witch's eye.

roles.name: Postmaster General
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — Neither rain nor snow nor gloom of night.

roles.name: Clacks Tower Engineer
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows along the Grand Trunk.

roles.name: Apprentice Clacks Operator
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — semaphore towers, batch jobs, callouts, and the Smoking GNU patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Igor of Quality
roles.description: Tendth the wounded and the weary — findth the maladieth in the build before they reach the Patrithian. Yeth, marthter.

roles.name: Town Crier
roles.description: Lifts the bell and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft. Oyez! Oyez!

roles.name: Editor of the Ankh-Morpork Times
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — The Truth Shall Make Ye Fret. Sounds the call to gather and convert.

roles.name: Reporter of the Times
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily edition.

roles.name: Scribe of Lord Vetinari
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the Patrician's office and the wizard's craft of design.

roles.name: Senior Wizard of UU
roles.description: Master of advanced Apex thaumaturgy — works at the High Energy Magic Building on the deepest spells.

roles.name: Lance-Constable of Code
roles.description: New recruit to the Watch — learns the badge, the helmet, and how not to confuse SOQL with SOSL on day one.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Ankh-Morpork City Watch — Crime CRM Rollout
Lancre & The Chalk — Headology Knowledge Base

children.name: Wee Free Men Crivens Stress Test
Lifetimer Inventory in the Hourglass Room

ankh-morpork-city-watch.themedRole: High Priest of the Sto Plains

unseen-university.themedRole: High Priest of the Sto Plains

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.themedRole: High Priest of the Sto Plains

death-and-his-domain.themedRole: High Priest of the Sto Plains

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Roll Call at Pseudopolis Yard
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Discovery sign-off — Vimes lights his cigar, the Watch falls in.

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Issue the Truncheons
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Build kickoff: every officer kitted out for the beat.

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Audience with the Patrician
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review at the Oblong Office.

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Glorious Revolution Dress Rehearsal
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Phase invoice trigger: People's Republic of Treacle Mine Road drill.

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Hogswatch Patrol Go-Live
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Go-Live: the Watch walks the streets with the new system.

ankh-morpork-city-watch.name: Commander's Hand-off
ankh-morpork-city-watch.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Captain Carrot.

unseen-university.name: Convocation of the Faculty
unseen-university.description: Project kickoff: the wizards are summoned from the Uncommon Room.

unseen-university.name: Hex Cold-Boot
unseen-university.description: Build phase: ants loaded, GBL initialised, Anthill Inside online.

unseen-university.name: Octogon Containment Test
unseen-university.description: UAT gate: nothing escaped the chalk circle (this time).

unseen-university.name: Convivium Demo
unseen-university.description: Go-Live: the new Hex demoed at the annual Convivium.

unseen-university.name: Return to High Table
unseen-university.description: Hyper-care close: faculty return to dinner — five courses, no ducks.

unseen-university.name: Bursar's Final Stipend
unseen-university.description: Final invoice: paid in dried-frog pills and a small annuity.

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Coven at the Standing Stones
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Discovery: the witches gather; Granny gets the only chair.

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Borrow the Land
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Build: requirements gathered through the eyes of every creature on the Chalk.

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Granny's Acceptance Stare
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Solution review: Granny Weatherwax looks at it. The build looks back. The build blinks first.

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Wee Free Men Go-Live
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Go-Live: Crivens! The system is live, ye scunners!

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Cottage Hand-off
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Project close: keys handed to Tiffany — the land remembers.

lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.name: Final Tithe
lancre-witches-and-tiffany-aching.description: Final invoice: paid in eggs, honey, and a respectful nod.

death-and-his-domain.name: Inventory the Hourglasses
death-and-his-domain.description: Discovery: every lifetimer in the room counted (it took a while).

death-and-his-domain.name: Forge the Scythe Blade
death-and-his-domain.description: Build: blade honed to a keenness that cuts sound itself.

death-and-his-domain.name: Auditor Compliance Review
death-and-his-domain.description: Solution review with the Auditors of Reality — they disapprove of personality, but signed off.

death-and-his-domain.name: Hogswatch Substitution Go-Live
death-and-his-domain.description: Go-Live: HO. HO. HO. THE NEW SYSTEM IS IN PRODUCTION.

death-and-his-domain.name: Return to the Domain
death-and-his-domain.description: Hyper-care close: Binky stabled, Albert frying eggs, all is well.

death-and-his-domain.name: Final Reckoning
death-and-his-domain.description: Final invoice: settled in the only currency that counts — time.

Sam Vimes.notes: Reading 'Where's My Cow?' to Young Sam at six o'clock — non-negotiable.

Carrot Ironfoundersson.notes: Letter home to the dwarf parents in Copperhead — handwritten.

Nobby Nobbs.notes: Verifying he is, in fact, human (annual).

Angua von Überwald.notes: Full moon — extended leave, whereabouts undisclosed.

Mustrum Ridcully.notes: Trout fishing on the Ankh — the fish are extremely dead but he tries anyway.

Rincewind.notes: Running away. Direction: anywhere that isn't here.

The Librarian.notes: Banana inventory audit — do NOT call him a monkey. Ook.

The Bursar.notes: Dried frog pill prescription review with the apothecary.

Granny Weatherwax.notes: Borrowing — body in cottage, mind out walking with the bees. Sign reads 'I ATEN'T DEAD'.

Nanny Ogg.notes: Family dinner — all fifteen children plus Greebo. Pub run afterward.

Tiffany Aching.notes: Tending the sheep on the Chalk — the land takes precedence over the project.

Magrat Garlick.notes: Royal duties at Lancre Castle — Verence needs help with the kingdom.

Death.notes: Cat sanctuary visit — DEATH LIKES CATS.

Susan Sto Helit.notes: Governess duties — the children require a firm hand and a working poker.

Albert.notes: Restocking the lard supply — fry-ups don't fry themselves.
